commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=8ad24737cd0a290ba88e3a60c7cf68f32e8904aa)
commands.review_summary:
This PR splits outbound channel resolution into shared and send-capable delivery paths, routes message send and poll delivery through the delivery resolver, and adds QQBot reconnect pending-delivery drains with tests.

PR surface: Source +98, Tests +268. Total +366 across 8 files.

Reproducibility: yes. for the PR finding by source inspection: the selector in `extensions/qqbot/src/channel.ts` does not match the reported lastError, and `src/infra/outbound/delivery-queue-recovery.ts` applies backoff when `bypassBackoff` is false. I did not run a live QQBot repro in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] A human should require the narrow selector fix plus contributor or maintainer-accepted real QQBot drain proof; automation cannot supply the contributor's live transport evidence.
commands.reason: comment version already processed in ledger
